rulesToWording.excludeModelOutputsFromFactors: Predicted and Scaled_Score must never appear in factor lists; store them under metadata.modelScores instead.
rulesToWording.hideIfZero: Do not display any variable whose value is exactly 0.
rulesToWording.topNDisplay: Display topFactors by default; allow users to expand to view full factors list if needed.
rulesToWording.rankingStrategy: Factors are ranked by descending absolute numeric value; non-numeric values appear after numeric values.
rulesToWording.noDataMessage: If a section has no non-zero factors, display: "No risk indicators available".

booleanDerivation.telco: Risky = Yes if results.telco.factors.length > 0 else No.
booleanDerivation.digital: Risky = Yes if results.digital.factors.length > 0 else No.
